TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspacePrimariesCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the color primaries defined by ITU-T H.273 (Coding-Independent Code Points).

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` enumerates the color primaries defined by ITU-T H.273 (Coding-Independent Code Points). Each value corresponds to a specific set of color primary chromaticity coordinates used to define a color space.
Use these values with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to create an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace> from a CICP primaries and transfer characteristics pair.
## Examples
```csharp // Create an sRGB-compatible color space using CICP values var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Iec6196621); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp GenericFilm = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Generic film primaries (value 8). Identical to the CIE 1931 color gamut.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp ItuTH273Value22 = int32(22)

Docs.summary: EBU Tech. 3213-E primaries (value 22), used in some broadcast applications.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec2020 = int32(9)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 / BT.2100 primaries (value 9), used for ultra-high-definition television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G primaries (value 5), used for PAL and SECAM standard-definition television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M primaries (value 4), used for NTSC standard-definition television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 / SMPTE 170M primaries (value 6), used for standard-definition digital television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 primaries (value 1), used for high-definition television and sRGB.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteEg4321 = int32(12)

Docs.summary: SMPTE EG 432-1 (DCI-P3) primaries (value 12), used for digital cinema and modern wide-color-gamut displays.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteRp4312 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: SMPTE RP 431-2 (DCI-P3 with D60 white point) primaries (value 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240M primaries (value 7), originally used for early HDTV production.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(10)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 primaries (value 10), used for digital cinema (XYZ color space).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Unknown = int32(0)
